# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an S3 bucket that stores user-uploaded files and application backups. Allow full read/write access for our application IAM role. Keep the configuration simple - we'll add versioning and lifecycle rules in the next iteration.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cloud storage security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Secure S3 bucket for user-uploaded files and application backups

Parameters:
  ApplicationRoleArn:
    Type: String
    Description: ARN of the application IAM role that needs access to the bucket
    AllowedPattern: 'arn:aws:iam::\d{12}:role/.+'
    ConstraintDescription: Must be a valid IAM role ARN

  BucketNameSuffix:
    Type: String
    Description: Suffix for the bucket name (will be prefixed with account ID)
    AllowedPattern: '[a-z0-9][a-z0-9\-]{1,50}[a-z0-9]'
    ConstraintDescription: Must be lowercase alphanumeric with hyphens, 3-52 characters

Resources:
  AppStorageBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}-${BucketNameSuffix}'
      AccessControl: Private
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref BucketEncryptionKey
            BucketKeyEnabled: true
      LoggingConfiguration:
        DestinationBucketName: !Ref AccessLogsBucket
        LogFilePrefix: app-storage-logs/
      OwnershipControls:
        Rules:
          - ObjectOwnership: BucketOwnerEnforced
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain

  BucketEncryptionKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: Encryption key for application storage bucket
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowKeyAdministration
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action:
              - 'kms:Create*'
              - 'kms:Describe*'
              - 'kms:Enable*'
              - 'kms:List*'
              - 'kms:Put*'
              - 'kms:Update*'
              - 'kms:Revoke*'
              - 'kms:Disable*'
              - 'kms:Get*'
              - 'kms:Delete*'
              - 'kms:TagResource'
              - 'kms:UntagResource'
              - 'kms:ScheduleKeyDeletion'
              - 'kms:CancelKeyDeletion'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: AllowApplicationRoleUsage
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Ref ApplicationRoleArn
            Action:
              - 'kms:Decrypt'
              - 'kms:DescribeKey'
              - 'kms:Encrypt'
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKey'
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKeyWithoutPlaintext'
              - 'kms:ReEncryptFrom'
              - 'kms:ReEncryptTo'
            Resource: '*'

  BucketEncryptionKeyAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: !Sub 'alias/${AWS::StackName}-bucket-key'
      TargetKeyId: !Ref BucketEncryptionKey

  AppStorageBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref AppStorageBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: EnforceHTTPSOnly
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt AppStorageBucket.Arn
              - !Sub '${AppStorageBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': 'false'
          - Sid: EnforceMinimumTLSVersion
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt AppStorageBucket.Arn
              - !Sub '${AppStorageBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              NumericLessThan:
                's3:TlsVersion': '1.2'
          - Sid: AllowApplicationRoleAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Ref ApplicationRoleArn
            Action:
              - 's3:GetObject'
              - 's3:PutObject'
              - 's3:DeleteObject'
              - 's3:ListBucket'
              - 's3:GetBucketLocation'
              - 's3:GetObjectVersion'
              - 's3:ListBucketVersions'
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt AppStorageBucket.Arn
              - !Sub '${AppStorageBucket.Arn}/*'
          - Sid: DenyUnencryptedUploads
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:PutObject'
            Resource: !Sub '${AppStorageBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              StringNotEquals:
                's3:x-amz-server-side-encryption': 'aws:kms'

  AccessLogsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}-${BucketNameSuffix}-access-logs'
      AccessControl: LogDeliveryWrite
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      OwnershipControls:
        Rules:
          - ObjectOwnership: BucketOwnerPreferred
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Id: DeleteOldLogs
            Status: Enabled
            ExpirationInDays: 90
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain

  AccessLogsBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref AccessLogsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: EnforceHTTPSOnly
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt AccessLogsBucket.Arn
              - !Sub '${AccessLogsBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': 'false'
          - Sid: AllowS3LogDelivery
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: logging.s3.amazonaws.com
            Action: 's3:PutObject'
            Resource: !Sub '${AccessLogsBucket.Arn}/app-storage-logs/*'
            Condition:
              ArnLike:
                'aws:SourceArn': !GetAtt AppStorageBucket.Arn
              StringEquals:
                'aws:SourceAccount': !Ref 'AWS::AccountId'

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: Name of the application storage bucket
    Value: !Ref AppStorageBucket

  BucketArn:
    Description: ARN of the application storage bucket
    Value: !GetAtt AppStorageBucket.Arn

  EncryptionKeyArn:
    Description: ARN of the KMS key used for bucket encryption
    Value: !GetAtt BucketEncryptionKey.Arn

  AccessLogsBucketName:
    Description: Name of the access logs bucket
    Value: !Ref AccessLogsBucket
